summary: Round-1 findings for .gitignore and .gitattributes are fully addressed; amend + re-tag left repo in a clean, consistent state (HEAD == master tag SHA, single commit, working tree clean). Task 2 is unblocked.

findings.title: Round-1 findings #1 and #2 resolved
findings.description: .gitignore now covers .kotlin/, *.apk, *.aab, *.dex, app/release/, app/debug/, hs_err_pid*.log, *.p12, *.pfx, keystore.properties, signing.properties. .gitattributes now binary-marks *.apk, *.aab, *.dex, *.gguf, *.onnx, *.p12, *.pfx, *.key, *.pem and adds explicit gradlew.bat text eol=crlf. All 12 check-ignore probes resolve to the expected rules.

findings.title: Amend + re-tag state verified consistent
findings.description: git log shows single commit b1e8747; master tag and HEAD both point to b1e874765c0069ffcd348166ff23a111b75b9584; working tree clean; current branch phase/1-foundation, master exists only as annotated tag (matches patterns.md intent). No dangling refs or orphaned objects visible.
findings.impact: None — amend + re-anchor executed cleanly, AC 'exactly 1 commit' satisfied.
findings.recommendation: No action. Task 2 (Gradle infrastructure) is unblocked.
